plugins.name: agent-companion
plugins.description: Claude runs as manager and consults several independent verifier agents in parallel — each returns its own verdict. Manager mode survives compaction, and the panel is fed the project's own convention skills.

plugins.name: auditing-prs
plugins.description: Audit GitHub PRs from one shared detection core: audit-pr fetches, drafts, and publishes review comments with consistent conventions and resolves issues when fixes land; prepush-audit is a read-only, chat-only self-check an executor runs before pushing to surface the same findings first. Optional agent-companion verifier panel for independent task-completion checks.

plugins.name: knowledge
plugins.description: Stack-independent base for the developer's coding-knowledge plugins: capture loop + human-gated codification + notify-only pattern observer.

plugins.name: knowledge-vue
plugins.description: The developer's Vue conventions as intent-triggered skills over shared Vue core rules, with SEO auto-application (baseline SEO by default). Depends on the knowledge base and knowledge-seo plugins.

plugins.name: knowledge-seo
plugins.description: Stack-independent SEO conventions (meta, structured data, robots, sitemaps, social previews, Core Web Vitals, IndexNow) for baseline-by-default SEO. Policy knowledge only — on-demand project-wide SEO auditing moved to `auditing:seo` (`/plugin install auditing@claude-skills`).

plugins.name: planning
plugins.description: Plan-then-build workflow: brainstorm a task into a self-contained plan, then implement that plan in a fresh session. Container for planning/workflow skills.

plugins.name: auditing
plugins.description: On-demand audits of a WHOLE application from a chosen perspective: business-analysis (product integrity, flows, monetization) and seo (SEO baseline). Read-only — reports findings, never fixes them. Audits of PR diffs and changes belong to the auditing-prs plugin. The seo skill requires the knowledge-seo plugin to be installed separately.
